vocab.example: Advanced statistics presented a formidable challenge due to the intricate data modeling involved.

vocab.meaning: nắm vững những nguyên tắc cơ bản
vocab.example: I found it exceptionally hard to grasp the fundamentals of organic chemistry during my freshman year.

vocab.meaning: không thể hiểu thấu/khó hiểu một cách bế tắc
vocab.example: To me, the legal terminology in our law modules was almost impenetrable without constant help from a tutor.
The sheer volume of information in anatomy lectures often led to cognitive overload by the end of the day.

vocab.meaning: mâu thuẫn với (cách tư duy tự nhiên)
vocab.example: I struggled with logic-based subjects as they were often at odds with my creative and intuitive way of thinking.

vocab.meaning: cuộc chiến cam go/nhiều khó khăn
vocab.example: Learning a tonal language like Mandarin was an uphill battle because my ear wasn't tuned to the nuances.
I found accounting particularly difficult simply because the material felt so dry and tedious to me.

vocab.meaning: nằm ngoài khả năng/phạm vi hiểu biết của ai
vocab.example: While I excel at languages, mastering complex algorithms felt entirely beyond my remit.
The mathematical component of the economics degree proved to be my main stumbling block.

vocab.meaning: bản chất kỹ thuật cao/phức tạp
vocab.example: The highly technical nature of engineering drawing required a level of precision I lacked.
